nodes.label: P(win game) vs hand strength, colored by TRUE/FALSE indicator, panels RA vs RE — in RE the relationship is a sharp sigmoid (skill deterministically decides the win), in RA it is a weak near-flat linear relation (luck dominates)

hyperedges.label: Figures jointly establishing that under RE (real effort) hand strength/skill deterministically decides the game winner, while under RA (random assignment) luck dominates and skill differences wash out
